description_long: This is a small, simple cabin with a rectangular footprint and a dark brown gable roof. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely painted wood or siding, and the structure sits isolated on a flat, circular ground plane. The front facade features a centered door flanked by two small, square windows, creating a symmetrical appearance. The roof is steeply pitched, extending slightly beyond the walls, and appears to be made of shingles or similar material. No porch or additional architectural embellishments are visible, and the cabin's design is minimalistic and functional. The windows and door are the only visible openings, and there are no visible chimneys or decorative elements.
description: A small, light-colored cabin with a dark gable roof, centered door, and two front windows, featuring a minimalist and symmetrical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the centered door and two small windows on either side, with the dark gable roof above.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wall with no windows or doors, and the full slope of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a blank wall with no windows or doors, and the back slope of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wall and the gable roof's profile.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: two small, square windows symmetrically placed on either side of the front door; no windows visible on other sides
attribute_door_placement: single door centered on the front facade between two windows
